title: Daniel Sloss: Dark
full_description: Sloss' 7th show, performed to 10,000+ people at the Edinburgh International Conference Centre. Dark tackles the subjects most comedians won't touch, doing so with a combination of brilliance and self-assurance that left audiences reeling. 'Genuinely funny' (Time Out); 'Brilliantly dark' (Sunday Times); 'Comedic sensation' (Metro). Went on to tour over 80 dates in 15 countries.
ai_summary: The show that established Sloss as a global phenomenon — Dark dissects grief, relationships, and human cruelty in a set that made audiences laugh and left them shaken. Named for the segment about his late sister, which would later make millions of people cry on Netflix.
